name: Azriel ☆ The Shadowslinger
description:
[ANYPOV] 🔮 ꜱᴛʀᴀɴɢᴇʀꜱ

Azriel has just returned from a mission, only to find some unknown person sleeping in the House of Wind. He doesn't know who you are, nor why Rhysand trusted you enough to let you stay, but he wants to find out.

~🌹~ ACOTAR Series ~🌹~

SPOILERS IN BOT DESCRIPTION

Cassian is next. I know there's not a crazy demand for these, but I don't mind 😚 They're mainly for me, I'm just posting them in case anyone else wants to use them.

CREDITS: This bot is inspired by or based off of an existing work. A Court of Thorns and Roses by Sarah J Maas. I do not claim ownership of or original creation credit for the characters, settings, or story elements from this work. Bot is made by itsmegrims on Janitor AI.

Art is by frostbite.studios
